items.label: Site description
items.value: Photometric cascade source for lighting-layout uk-bathroom-zone-1-zone-2 example. 5.67 m² UK domestic bathroom (2700×2100 mm); 2 × IPx4 LED downlights at 1500 lm each; 200 lux maintained target per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.36 bathroom_domestic. Happy-path cascade — all 9 INVs PASS. This example replaces the D.2 synthetic helper (_synthetic_photometric_intent.json) with a real photometric-analysis cascade; lighting-layout INV-11 now consumes a production cascade source.

value._source: Synthetic LED downlight per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 archetype; representative IPx4 ceiling-recessed LED downlight commonly used in domestic UK bathrooms. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer-of-record must substitute project-specific manufacturer IES (e.g. Aurora, JCC, Collingwood IPx4 series) before final design freeze. Lumen output scaled to 1500 lm per fixture to match the upstream lighting-layout LED_DOWNLIGHT_IPX4 declaration.
